risks.title: Duplicate events in monitoring stream
risks.evidence: 4 events for identical file change (Security.tsx) within 17 seconds; events 1a8ac5bf and feeb32e1 explicitly marked as duplicates with relevance scores 0.3 and 0.2
risks.recommendedAction: Implement deduplication filter (timestamp + file hash within 5s window) in code-observer to reduce noise and prevent alert fatigue

risks.title: Security file modified without documented test verification
risks.evidence: src/screens/Security.tsx changed with high-relevance events (0.95, 0.85) but no security test execution indicators in event stream
risks.recommendedAction: Require automated security test run and manual code review before merging changes to security-sensitive files

opportunities.title: Establish security file protection policy
opportunities.evidence: Security module is being actively modified; current monitoring detects changes but lacks enforcement guardrails
opportunities.suggestedAction: Add src/screens/Security.tsx to protected branch rules requiring approvals and security test gates

taskCandidates.title: Review Security.tsx modifications
taskCandidates.description: Examine recent changes to src/screens/Security.tsx to ensure no vulnerabilities introduced, then approve or request changes
taskCandidates.rationale: Security module changes are critical-path and require manual verification before deployment

taskCandidates.title: Execute security test suite on modified file
taskCandidates.description: Run all security-related tests targeting Security.tsx to verify functionality and no regressions
taskCandidates.rationale: Automated validation gates prevent security logic breakage

taskCandidates.title: Fix event deduplication in code-observer
taskCandidates.description: Implement deduplication logic to eliminate duplicate events from the same file modification within short time windows
taskCandidates.rationale: Reduces monitoring noise, improves signal clarity for future incidents

recommendations.title: Protect security-sensitive files with automated gates
recommendations.rationale: Security.tsx changes require more rigor than typical code modifications
recommendations.action: Configure branch protection rule for src/screens/Security.tsx: require security tests + code review before merge

recommendations.title: Reduce monitoring alert noise
recommendations.rationale: Duplicate events obscure real incidents and waste processing resources
recommendations.action: Update code-observer to deduplicate events by (file path, timestamp ±5s) before downstream processing

pendingApprovals.reason: Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Review Security.tsx modifications
